variants.title: Filtrec D121G06X Pressure Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D121G06X. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D121G06X provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Outer Diameter: 51.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 23.8 mm, Length: 207.0 mm
